subject: Aromatic Grass Energy — a glowing green spherical energy orb with a leaf plant symbol at its center
description: A luminous green sphere dominates the card art, containing a leaf or plant sprig symbol at its core. The orb radiates soft green light outward against a darker background with subtle green energy tones. The image is an abstract symbolic composition representing grass-type energy in the Pokemon TCG. No figures or creatures are present — this is pure elemental iconography.
foreground: Glowing green energy sphere with leaf symbol inside
background: Dark background with soft green energy glow
